test.note: Pre-existing failures only: dsn-parser.test.ts fails due to missing DATABASE_URL env var (db/index.ts import), e2e.test.ts fails due to missing INBOUND_API_KEY. Unit tests that don't require external services (inbound-dedupe: 4 pass, rate-tracker: 3 pass) all pass. Same baseline as runtime-config milestone.

typecheck.note: Only 3 pre-existing errors: bun:test module declarations in test files. No new type errors introduced by remove-autumn features. Same baseline as runtime-config milestone.

lint.note: 315 errors and 969 warnings — all pre-existing in app/(content)/ pages. Lint errors slightly reduced from runtime-config baseline (329 errors) due to deleted autumn-related files. No new lint errors introduced.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Dead Customer type export from autumn-js remains in features/settings/types/index.ts (lines 1 and 4). No file imports this type — all consumers were deleted. This is dead code referencing the removed autumn-js package. Located outside the feature's grep scope (features/ not searched).
scripts/autumn-upgrade-analysis.ts still imports from autumn-js. This is a standalone analysis script outside the feature scope.

lib/autumn/get-product-change-texts.tsx stub file remains. It was created by the backend feature as a compatibility bridge for the UI feature, but the UI feature deleted the consumer (components/autumn/) without cleaning up this stub. The file does not import autumn-js and is not imported by anything — pure dead code. VAL-AUTUMN-005 states lib/autumn/ should not exist.
.cursor/rules/autumn-pricing.mdc still references autumn-js patterns. This is IDE configuration, not runtime code.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When scoping dependency removal features, the verification grep should cover ALL source directories (app/, components/, lib/, features/, hooks/, contexts/, functions/, scripts/) not just the primary ones. Dependencies can be re-exported or referenced in feature modules and utility scripts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features remove-autumn-backend and remove-autumn-ui verified with 'rg autumn app/ lib/ components/' but missed features/settings/types/index.ts (dead Customer type export) and scripts/autumn-upgrade-analysis.ts. Both are outside the verified directories.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-existing tsc and lint failures need to be fixed
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented as pre-existing baseline in runtime-config synthesis. Not introduced by remove-autumn features.

rejectedObservations.observation: lib/autumn/get-product-change-texts.tsx stub should have been deleted by the UI feature
rejectedObservations.reason: Captured as non-blocking issue. The backend feature created the stub to bridge the two-feature split, and the UI feature should have cleaned it up. Not worth a blocking issue since the file doesn't import autumn-js and is dead code.
